entities.name: OZONE
entities.description: Blue-colored gaseous molecule present in the stratosphere that causes oxidative stress and damage to plant health

entities.name: STRATOSPHERE
entities.description: Region of the Earth's atmosphere where ozone is naturally present

entities.name: MOLECULAR OXYGEN
entities.description: Molecule that undergoes photolysis by UV radiations to form ozone

entities.name: UV RADIATIONS
entities.description: Solar radiations that cause the photolysis of molecular oxygen

entities.name: OZONE SENSITIVITY
entities.description: Plant characteristic linked to leaf mass per area, antioxidant levels, and stomatal conductance

entities.name: LEAF MASS PER AREA
entities.description: Physical attribute of leaves linked to ozone sensitivity

entities.name: ANTIOXIDANT LEVELS
entities.description: Leaf area-based biochemical levels linked to ozone sensitivity

entities.name: STOMATAL CONDUCTANCE
entities.description: Physiological rate of gas exchange through stomata linked to ozone sensitivity

entities.name: VEGETABLE CROP
entities.description: Plants that suffered severe damage from ozone in Los Angeles

entities.name: LOS ANGELES
entities.description: Location where severe vegetable crop damage due to ozone was reported in 1905

entities.name: STOMATA
entities.description: Pores in the leaf through which ozone enters to trigger cellular responses

entities.name: CELLULAR RESPONSE
entities.description: Biological reaction triggered within plant cells upon the entry of ozone

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The output of crops, which is damaged by ozone-induced cellular responses

entities.name: OXIDATIVE STRESS
entities.description: Stress induced by ozone leading to redox-dependent alterations in ion conductance

entities.name: ION CONDUCTANCE
entities.description: Physiological movement of ions that undergoes redox-dependent alterations under oxidative stress

entities.name: PLANT SPECIES
entities.description: Biological entities that experience oxidative stress and ion conductance alterations

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM
entities.description: Biological community and environment in which plants constitute a significant part
